revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:家形石棺]]
[[File:石人山古墳家型石棺.JPG|thumb|Sekijinzan Kofun (Hirokawa, Fukuoka Prefecture)]] '''Iegata Sekkan''' (家形石棺) is a type of {{ill|sekkan|ja|石棺|1=Sekkan|1=Sekkan (Sarcophagus)|lt=Sarcophagus|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sekkan|13=User:Immanuelle/Sekkan|qq=}} observed during the {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}}. It features a roof-shaped lid, and the coffin body is either a hewn or assembled box-shaped structure. The sloped edges of the lid include rectangular-sectioned rope-hitch projections. This type was used for a long period from the mid-to-late Kofun period. In its later stages, designs such as lattice patterns on the coffin body or lotus patterns carved into the rope-hitch projections also appeared. Some coffins had side openings, known as horizontal entrance-style Sarcophaguss. Materials like Tatsuyama stone (sourced from {{ill|Takasago, Hyōgo|en|Takasago, Hyōgo|qid=Q869037|lt=Takasago, Hyōgo|1=Takasago, Hyōgo}} in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}), Nijozan white stone (from the foothills of {{ill|Nijozan|ja|二上山|1=Futakami Mountain|2=ja|3=二上山|lt=Mount Futakami (or Nijo)|comment=Kanji are ambiguous between the two pronounciations|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nijozan|13=User:Immanuelle/Futakami Mountain|qq=}}), and {{ill|Aso Pink Stone|ja|阿蘇ピンク石|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aso pink stone|qq=}} (from the {{ill|Uto Peninsula|en|Uto Peninsula|qid=Q11449190|lt=Uto Peninsula|1=Uto Peninsula}} in {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}) were commonly used.
== Main Kofun Yielding Iegata Sekkan == === Tohoku Region === * {{ill|Ichizuka Kofun|ja|一塚古墳|1=Hitotsuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichizuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitotsuka Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Sendai|en|Sendai|qid=Q46747|lt=Sendai|1=Sendai}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi Prefecture|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}
=== Kanto Region === * {{ill|Sōja Atagoyama Kofun|ja|総社愛宕山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōja Atagoyama Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Maebashi|en|Maebashi|qid=Q201613|lt=Maebashi|1=Maebashi}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}} * {{ill|Hōtōzan Kofun|en|Hōtōzan Kofun|qid=Q17217330|lt=Hōtōzan Kofun|1=Hōtōzan Kofun}} - Maebashi, Gunma Prefecture, features lattice patterns
=== Chubu Region === * {{ill|Shizuhatagayama Kofun|en|Shizuhatagayama Kofun|qid=Q2791117|lt=Shizuhatayama Kofun|1=Shizuhatagayama Kofun}} - {{ill|Shizuoka (city)|en|Shizuoka (city)|qid=Q174691|lt=Shizuoka|1=Shizuoka (city)}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}} * {{ill|Omaki No. 1 Kofun|ja|大牧1号古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omaki No. 1 Kofun|1=Oumakiichigoukohun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11437789}} - {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|qid=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara|1=Kakamigahara}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}} * {{ill|Hasaki Nakahora Kofun|ja|羽崎中洞古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasaki Nakahora Kofun|1=hazakinakaborakofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11610117}} - Gifu Prefecture, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|en|Kani, Gifu|qid=Q853805|lt=Kani|1=Kani, Gifu}} * {{ill|Fukojizuka Kofun|ja|不孝寺塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukojizuka Kofun|1=Fukoujiduka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361683}} - Kani, Gifu Prefecture * {{ill|Iwaya Kofun (Komaki)|ja|岩屋古墳 (小牧市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaya Kofun (Komaki)|qq=}} - {{ill|Komaki|en|Komaki|qid=Q389537|lt=Komaki|1=Komaki}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}} * {{ill|Sandenkanaya Kofun|en|Sandenkanaya Kofun|qid=Q18336996|lt=Santakanaya Kofun|1=Sandenkanaya Kofun}} - {{ill|Hōdatsushimizu, Ishikawa|en|Hōdatsushimizu, Ishikawa|qid=Q1204817|lt=Hōdatsushimizu|1=Hōdatsushimizu, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}
=== Kinki Region === * {{ill|Kamo Inariyama Kofun|ja|鴨稲荷山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Inariyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 稲荷山古墳 (高島市)|1=Inariyama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17193420}} - {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|en|Takashima, Shiga|qid=Q845794|lt=Takashima|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}} * {{ill|Fujinoki Tomb|en|Fujinoki Tomb|qid=Q3198273|lt=Fujinoki Kofun|1=Fujinoki Tomb}} - {{ill|Ikaruga, Nara|en|Ikaruga, Nara|qid=Q379233|lt=Ikaruga|1=Ikaruga, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}} * {{ill|Mise Maruyama Kofun|ja|見瀬丸山古墳|1=Maruyama Kofun (Kashihara)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mise Maruyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Maruyama Kofun (Kashihara)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 丸山古墳 (橿原市)}} - {{ill|Kashihara, Nara|en|Kashihara, Nara|qid=Q496319|lt=Kashihara|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Ueyama Kofun|en|Ueyama Kofun|qid=Q11540500|lt=Ueyan Kofun|1=Ueyama Kofun}} - Kashihara, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Kotani Kofun|ja|小谷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotani Kofun|qq=}} - Kashihara, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Shōbuike Kofun|en|Shōbuike Kofun|qid=Q17993516|lt=Shōbui Kofun|1=Shōbuike Kofun}} - Kashihara, Nara Prefecture, with intricate carvings resembling a house * {{ill|Bakuya Kofun|en|Bakuya Kofun|qid=Q11570540|lt=Makino Kofun|1=Bakuya Kofun}} - {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|qid=Q1346830|lt=Koryo|1=Kōryō, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Kunugiyama Kofun|ja|櫟山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunugiyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579107|1=Kunugiyama Kofun}} - {{ill|Taima, Nara|en|Taima, Nara|qid=Q7676155|lt=Taima|1=Taima, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Chihara Kitsunetsuka Kofun|ja|茅原狐塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chihara Kitsunetsuka Kofun|1=Chihara Kitsunezuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11617185}} - {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|qid=Q127026|lt=Sakurai|1=Sakurai, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture * [[:en:Akasaka Tennōzan Kofun|Akasaka Tennōzan Kofun]] - Sakurai, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Hokenoyama Kofun|en|Hokenoyama Kofun|qid=Q11337664|lt=Hokenoyama Kofun|1=Hokenoyama Kofun}} - Sakurai, Nara Prefecture, reused in the late 6th century * {{ill|Miyakozuka Kofun|en|Miyakozuka Kofun|qid=Q24869088|lt=Miyakozuka Kofun|1=Miyakozuka Kofun}} - {{ill|Asuka, Nara|en|Asuka, Nara|qid=Q752397|lt=Asuka|1=Asuka, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Jōurugami Kofun|en|Jōurugami Kofun|qid=Q55537165|lt=Jōuru Shrine Kofun|1=Jōurugami Kofun}} - {{ill|Gose, Nara|en|Gose, Nara|qid=Q847334|lt=Gose|1=Gose, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture, one of the largest coffins and burial chambers in Japan * {{ill|Midoro South Kofun|ja|水泥南古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Midoro South Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 水泥古墳|1=Midoro Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55537636}} - Gose, Nara Prefecture, featuring lotus patterns on the rope-hitch projections * {{ill|Hami Kofun|ja|ハミ塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hami Kofun|1=Hamizuka Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11326717}} - {{ill|Tenri, Nara|en|Tenri, Nara|qid=Q502196|lt=Tenri|1=Tenri, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture * {{ill|Oguchiyama Kofun|ja|小口山古墳|1=Koguchiyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguchiyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Koguchiyama Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|qid=Q694308|lt=Habikino|1=Habikino}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}} * {{ill|Karabetsuyama Kofun|ja|唐櫃山古墳|1=Karatoyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karabetsuyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Karatoyama Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Fujiidera|en|Fujiidera|qid=Q634011|lt=Fujiidera|1=Fujiidera}}, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Nagamochiyama Kofun|ja|長持山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagamochiyama Kofun|qq=}} - Fujiidera, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|en|Ichisuka Kofun Cluster|qid=Q11353283|lt=Ichisuga Kofun Cluster|1=Ichisuka Kofun Cluster}} - {{ill|Kanan, Osaka|en|Kanan, Osaka|qid=Q2305508|lt=Kanan|1=Kanan, Osaka}}, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Tamatemiyama Kofun Cluster|ja|玉手山古墳群|1=Tamateyama Kofun Group|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamatemiyama Kofun Cluster|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamateyama Kofun Group|qq=}} - {{ill|Kashiwara|en|Kashiwara|qid=Q873583|lt=Kashiwara|1=Kashiwara}}, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Mimihara Kofun|ja|耳原古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mimihara Kofun|1=Minohara Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11610725}} - {{ill|Ibaraki, Osaka|en|Ibaraki, Osaka|qid=Q502403|lt=Ibaraki, Osaka|1=Ibaraki, Osaka}}, Osaka Prefecture * {{ill|Ōtani Kofun|ja|大谷古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtani Kofun|1=Ōtani Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97312140}} - {{ill|Wakayama (city)|en|Wakayama (city)|qid=Q200747|lt=Wakayama|1=Wakayama (city)}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}} * {{ill|Hakuchozuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|ja|白鳥塚古墳 (宝塚市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakuchozuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|1=Shiratorizuka Kofun (Takarazuka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11580553}} - {{ill|Takarazuka, Hyōgo|en|Takarazuka, Hyōgo|qid=Q823967|lt=Takarazuka|1=Takarazuka, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture
=== Chugoku Region === * {{ill|Ezaki Kofun|ja|江崎古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ezaki Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Sōja|en|Sōja|qid=Q873536|lt=Sōja|1=Sōja}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}} * {{ill|Kōmorizuka Kofun|en|Kōmorizuka Kofun|qid=Q11266204|lt=Komorizuka Kofun|1=Kōmorizuka Kofun}} - Sōja, Okayama Prefecture * {{ill|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|en|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|qid=Q11570258|lt=Musa Ōtsuka Kofun|1=Musa Ōtsuka Kofun}} - {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}}, Okayama Prefecture * {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|ja|築山古墳 (瀬戸内市)|1=Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi city)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Setouchi city)|qq=}} - {{ill|Setouchi, Okayama|en|Setouchi, Okayama|qid=Q691691|lt=Setouchi, Okayama|1=Setouchi, Okayama}}, Okayama Prefecture * {{ill|Okadayama Kofun|en|Okadayama Kofun|qid=Q11473525|lt=Okadayama Kofun|1=Okadayama Kofun}} - {{ill|Matsue|en|Matsue|qid=Q207321|lt=Matsue|1=Matsue}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}} * {{ill|Arai no Ishi Fune Kofun|ja|新井の石舟古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arai no Ishi Fune Kofun|1=Arai no Ishi Fune Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11501137}} - {{ill|Tottori (city)|en|Tottori (city)|qid=Q200731|lt=Tottori|1=Tottori (city)}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|qid=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}
=== Kyushu Region === * {{ill|Sekijinzan Kofun|ja|石人山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sekijinzan Kofun|qq=}} - {{ill|Hirokawa|ja|広川町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirokawa|1=hirogawachou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11485375}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, features embossed patterns on the lid * {{ill|Shimoyama Kofun (Usuki)|en|Shimoyama Kofun (Usuki)|qid=Q11360813|lt=Shimoyama Kofun (Usuki)|1=Shimoyama Kofun (Usuki)}} - {{ill|Usuki, Ōita|en|Usuki, Ōita|qid=Q845792|lt=Usuki|1=Usuki, Ōita}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}} * {{ill|Eta Funayama Kofun|en|Eta Funayama Kofun|qid=Q11259227|lt=Eta Funayama Kofun|1=Eta Funayama Kofun}} - {{ill|Nagomi, Kumamoto|en|Nagomi, Kumamoto|qid=Q1156415|lt=Nankan|1=Nagomi, Kumamoto}}, {{ill|Kumamoto Prefecture|en|Kumamoto Prefecture|qid=Q130308|lt=Kumamoto Prefecture|1=Kumamoto Prefecture}}
== Gallery == <gallery> Soja Atagoyama Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Sōja Atagoyama Kofun (Maebashi, Gunma Prefecture) Hotozan Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Hōtōzan Kofun (Maebashi, Gunma Prefecture) Shizuhatayama-kofun sekishitsu.JPG|Shizuhatayama Kofun (Shizuoka, Shizuoka Prefecture) Mimiharakohun02.JPG|Mimihara Kofun (Ibaraki, Osaka Prefecture) Hakuchozuka Kofun (Takarazuka), sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Hakuchozuka Kofun (Takarazuka, Hyōgo Prefecture) Kotani Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Kotani Kofun (Kashihara, Nara Prefecture) Ichio Miyazuka Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Ichio Miyazuka Kofun (Takatori, Nara Prefecture) Shinguyama Kofun, sekkan-2 3D-B.jpg|Shinguyama Kofun (Gose, Nara Prefecture) Midoro Minami Kofun, sekkan-1 3D-B.jpg|Midoro Minami Kofun (Gose, Nara Prefecture) Midoro Minami Kofun, sekkan-2 3D-B.jpg|Midoro Minami Kofun (Gose, Nara Prefecture) 菖蒲池古墳 石棺.jpg|Shōbui Kofun (Asuka, Nara Prefecture) Kunugiyama-kofun sekikan.jpg|Kunugiyama Kofun (Katsuragi, Nara Prefecture) Hokenoyama-kofun sekikan.jpg|Hokenoyama Kofun (Sakurai, Nara Prefecture) Miyakozuka-kofun sekikan.jpg|Miyakozuka Kofun (Asuka, Nara Prefecture) Nagamochiyama-kofun sekikan.jpg|Nagamochiyama Kofun (Fujiidera, Osaka Prefecture) Koumoridzuka Kofun 12.jpg|Komorizuka Kofun (Okayama, Okayama Prefecture) Musa Otsuka Kofun 07.jpg|Musa Ōtsuka Kofun (Okayama, Okayama Prefecture) Kanago Sekitoutsuka Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Kanago Sekitōtsuka Kofun (Sōja, Okayama Prefecture) Ezaki Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Ezaki Kofun (Sōja, Okayama Prefecture) Kitazuka Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Kitazuka Kofun (Fukuyama, Hiroshima Prefecture) Mitoshiro Kofun, sekkan-1 3D-B.jpg|Mitoshiro Kofun Chamber (Mihara, Hiroshima Prefecture) Mitoshiro Kofun, sekkan-2 3D-B.jpg|Mitoshiro Kofun Antechamber (Mihara, Hiroshima Prefecture) Dainichi Kofun, sekkan 3D-B.jpg|Dainichi Kofun (Hōfu, Yamaguchi Prefecture) Osafune Tsukiyama kofun 06.jpg|Osafune Tsukiyama Kofun (Ōita, Ōita Prefecture) 石人山古墳家型石棺.JPG|Sekijinzan Kofun (Hirokawa, Fukuoka Prefecture) </gallery>
== References == * Tadahiko Makabe, *Considering the Kofun Period Through Stone Coffins*, {{ill|Dōbōsha Shuppan|ja|同朋舎出版|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōbōsha Shuppan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 図書印刷同朋舎|1=DOHOSHA Printhing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11414664}}, January 1994. * Koichi Tamura, Yoshimasa Gōda, *Fundamental Terms for Archaeological Exploration*, {{ill|Yamakawa Publishing|ja|山川出版社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamakawa Publishing|1=Yamakawa Shuppansha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11468274}}, July 2000, p. 4.
== See Also == * {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} * {{ill|Sarcophaguss|ja|石棺|1=Sekkan|1=Sekkan (Sarcophagus)|lt=Sarcophagus|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarcophaguss|13=User:Immanuelle/Sekkan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} * {{ill|Japanese imperial tombs|en|Japanese imperial tombs|qid=Q17218816|lt=Japanese imperial tombs|1=Japanese imperial tombs}}
